critical.mandate: Invoke discover-inputs protocol to load upstream artifacts
All sections must be collaboratively developed with the user

step.title: Discover Inputs
step.action: Invoke discover-inputs protocol
Load brainstorm output if available
Load market research if available
Load domain research if available
Load technical research if available
Load creative outputs if available
Summarize what upstream context was found

step.title: Vision Statement
step.action: Collaboratively craft vision statement with user
Incorporate insights from prior analysis if available
step.ask: What is the core vision for this product?

step.title: Target Users
step.action: Define user personas based on research
For each persona: name, role, goals, pain points, context

step.title: Problem Statement
step.action: Articulate the core problem being solved
Ground in user research, market findings, and domain landscape

step.title: Proposed Solution
step.action: Define high-level solution approach
Key features and differentiators
Reference technical research for technology selection rationale if available

step.title: Scope, Risks and Competitive Landscape
step.action: Define what is in-scope for this product and what is explicitly out of scope
Document known risks, dependencies, and assumptions the solution depends on
Summarize competitive landscape from upstream brainstorm and market research — key competitors, positioning, and differentiation

step.title: Success Metrics
step.action: Define measurable KPIs and success criteria
Include both quantitative and qualitative metrics

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate product brief with these exact sections: ## Vision Statement — core product vision ## Target Users — user personas (name, role, goals, pain points, context for each) ## Problem Statement — core problem being solved, grounded in research ## Proposed Solution — high-level solution approach ## Key Features — feature list with differentiators ## Scope and Boundaries — what is in-scope and what is explicitly out of scope ## Risks and Assumptions — known risks, dependencies, and assumptions ## Competitive Landscape — summary of competitive positioning from upstream research ## Success Metrics — measurable KPIs and success criteria ## Next Steps — per lifecycle-sequence.yaml
